message.content:
I need to read these files in full to understand their APIs and patterns. Read all of these files completely and report back their full contents:

1. apps/mobile/src/components/PostCard.tsx - I need to see all props it accepts
2. apps/mobile/src/components/PostCardSkeleton.tsx - props
3. apps/mobile/src/screens/Home/HomeFeedScreen.tsx - I need to see reaction/bookmark/repost interaction handlers and how PostCard is used
4. apps/mobile/src/components/icons/index.ts or similar - to check FireIcon export
5. apps/mobile/src/hooks/useBookmarkMutation.ts or similar - to see the bookmark hook API
6. apps/mobile/src/lib/api/socialApi.ts or similar - to see reaction/repost API
7. apps/mobile/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx or similar useAuth hook - to see user object shape

For each file, report its FULL content. This is critical - don't summarize, show the actual code.
